justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's temporal requests throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly offered the same two options (try another day or an online meeting) without exploring other times on the requested days until the user explicitly asked for it.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls by not checking for other times on a given day until specifically prompted by the user.
justifications.customer_experience: The repeated apologies and the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times on the same day made the conversation feel frustrating and inefficient for the customer.
